title: Add Database Indexes for Order Query Optimization
user_story: As a backend developer, I want composite indexes on the orders table for common query patterns, so that dashboard endpoint response times stay under 200ms even at scale.

acceptance_criteria.description: Composite index on (customer_id, created_at) is added to the orders table
Composite index on (status, created_at) is added to the orders table
Dashboard endpoint responds within 200ms for up to 10,000 concurrent users
Index creation does not cause downtime or lock the orders table during migration

title: Implement Predictive Auto-Scaling for Scheduled Events
user_story: As a DevOps engineer, I want the infrastructure to pre-warm instances before known traffic spikes, so that users do not experience 503 errors during product launches.

acceptance_criteria.description: System allows scheduling a scale-up event tied to a future date and time
Pre-warming starts at least 15 minutes before the scheduled event
Instances are fully healthy and serving traffic before the expected spike begins
Scale-up events are logged with instance count and readiness timestamp

title: Reduce Instance Startup Time with Pre-Built AMIs
user_story: As a DevOps engineer, I want instances to start in under 45 seconds using pre-built images, so that auto-scaling responds fast enough to handle sudden traffic spikes.

acceptance_criteria.description: AMI build pipeline produces images with all dependencies pre-installed
New instances reach healthy state within 45 seconds of launch
AMI build is triggered automatically on dependency updates

title: Implement Chart Data Aggregation and Virtual Scrolling
user_story: As a power user, I want the analytics dashboard to render smoothly even with large datasets, so that I can analyze trends without browser freezing.

acceptance_criteria.description: Charts with more than 1000 data points are automatically aggregated to 500 visible points
Users can zoom into a chart section to see full-resolution data for that range
Dashboard renders without jank or frame drops exceeding 100ms
Aggregation algorithm preserves peaks, valleys, and trend direction

title: Implement Read Replica for Reporting Queries
user_story: As a backend developer, I want analytics queries routed to a read replica, so that reporting workloads do not degrade user-facing transactional performance.

acceptance_criteria.description: Read replica is configured with replication lag under 5 seconds
Reporting and analytics queries are automatically routed to the replica
Transactional queries continue using the primary database exclusively
Connection pool for replica is separate from the primary pool

title: Add Real-Time Performance Monitoring Alerts
user_story: As a DevOps engineer, I want automated alerts when endpoint latency degrades, so that the team is notified before users start complaining.

acceptance_criteria.description: Alert fires when p95 latency exceeds 500ms on any monitored endpoint
Alerts are delivered via configured channels (Slack, email, PagerDuty)
Alert includes endpoint name, current p95 value, and time of threshold breach
